languages.text: "Все верно. Схватка измеряет не только силу тела, но и мощь духа." {n}Арджента воздевает кулак к небу, сжимая его так яростно, будто пытается сломить саму мысль о малодушии.{/n} "Триумф приходит к достойнейшему… к тому, чья вера крепче, а намерение чище. И разве не к подобному надлежит вести других? Сей обычай не лишен истины".

traits.locale_text: "Все верно. Схватка изменяет не только силу тела, но и мощь духа." {n}Арджента воздевает кулак к небу, сжимая его так яростно, будто пытается сломить саму мысль о малодушии.{/n} "Триумф приходит к достойнейшему… к тому, чья вера крепче, а намерение чище. И разве не к подобному надлежит вести других? Сей обычай не лишен истины".
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "That is true. Battle tests not only the strength of the body but also the power of the spirit." {n}Argenta raises her fist to the sky, clenching it with such force that she seems to crush the very idea of cowardice.{/n} "Triumph belongs to the most worthy, to the one whose faith is stronger and whose intent is purer. And is it not such that should lead others? There is truth in this tradition."
languages.original_text: "Все верно. Схватка измеряет не только силу тела, но и мощь духа." {n}Арджента воздевает кулак к небу, сжимая его так яростно, будто пытается сломить саму мысль о малодушии.{/n} "Триумф приходит к достойнейшему… к тому, чья вера крепче, а намерение чище. И разве не к подобному надлежит вести других? Сей обычай не лишен истины".

traits.locale_text: "That is true. Combat changes not only the strength of the body but also the power of the spirit." {n}Argenta raises her fist to the sky, clenching it with such fury that she seems to crush the very notion of cowardice.{/n} "Triumph belongs to the most worthy, to he whose faith is stronger and whose intent is purer. And is it not such that should lead others? This custom is not without truth."

And is it not such that should lead others? This custom is not without truth."

And is it not such that should lead others? There is truth in this tradition."

"That is true. Battle tests not only the strength of the body but also the power of the spirit." {n}Argenta raises her fist to the sky, clenching it with such force that she seems to crush the very idea of cowardice.{/n} "Triumph belongs to the most worthy, to the one whose faith is stronger and whose intent is purer. And is it not such that should lead others? There is truth in this tradition."

languages.text: «Eso es cierto. La batalla no solo pone a prueba la fuerza física, sino también el espíritu de cada uno». {n}Argenta levanta el puño hacia el cielo y lo aprieta como si quisiera triturar el concepto de la cobardía.{/n} «El triunfo es para el más digno, aquél cuya fe es más fuerte y cuyas intenciones son más puras. ¿Y no es esa también la esencia del liderazgo? Esta tradición está basada en grandes verdades».
languages.original_text: "That is true. Battle tests not only the strength of the body but also the power of the spirit." {n}Argenta raises her fist to the sky, clenching it with such force that she seems to crush the very idea of cowardice.{/n} "Triumph belongs to the most worthy, to the one whose faith is stronger and whose intent is purer. And is it not such that should lead others? There is truth in this tradition."

traits.locale_text: «Eso es cierto. La batalla no solo pone a prueba la fuerza física, sino también el espíritu de cada uno». {n}Argenta levanta el puño hacia el cielo y lo aprieta como si quisiera triturar el concepto de la cobardía.{/n} «El triunfo es para el más digno, aquél cuya fe es más fuerte y cuyas intenciones son más puras. ¿Y no es esa también la esencia del liderazgo? Esta tradición está basada en grandes verdades».

languages.text: “确实如此。战斗，既是对肉体力量的考验，亦是对灵魂伟力的试炼。”{n}阿洁塔将拳头举向天空，攥得如此用力，仿佛要凭这股劲道将那怯懦的念头彻底碾碎。{/n}“胜利，当归于最当之无愧之人，归于信仰更为坚定、意志更为纯洁之人。而这样的人，难道不正该引领他人吗？这一传统，确有真意。”
languages.original_text: "That is true. Battle tests not only the strength of the body but also the power of the spirit." {n}Argenta raises her fist to the sky, clenching it with such force that she seems to crush the very idea of cowardice.{/n} "Triumph belongs to the most worthy, to the one whose faith is stronger and whose intent is purer. And is it not such that should lead others? There is truth in this tradition."

traits.locale_text: “确实如此。战斗，既是对肉体力量的考验，亦是对灵魂伟力的试炼。”{n}阿洁塔将拳头举向天空，攥得如此用力，仿佛要凭这股劲道将那怯懦的念头彻底碾碎。{/n}“胜利，当归于最当之无愧之人，归于信仰更为坚定、意志更为纯洁之人。而这样的人，难道不正该引领他人吗？这一传统，确有真意。”

languages.text: « C'est vrai. Le combat n'est pas seulement un test d'aptitudes physiques, mais aussi une épreuve qui mesure la force de l'esprit. » {n}Argenta lève le poing vers le ciel, le contractant avec une telle force qu'elle semble broyer le concept même de lâcheté.{/n} « La victoire appartient aux plus valeureux, à ceux dont la foi est la plus pure et dont les intentions sont les plus nobles. De telles qualités sont indispensables au commandement. Cette tradition a une part de vérité. »
languages.original_text: "That is true. Battle tests not only the strength of the body but also the power of the spirit." {n}Argenta raises her fist to the sky, clenching it with such force that she seems to crush the very idea of cowardice.{/n} "Triumph belongs to the most worthy, to the one whose faith is stronger and whose intent is purer. And is it not such that should lead others? There is truth in this tradition."

traits.locale_text: « C'est vrai. Le combat n'est pas seulement un test d'aptitudes physiques, mais aussi une épreuve qui mesure la force de l'esprit. » {n}Argenta lève le poing vers le ciel, le contractant avec une telle force qu'elle semble broyer le concept même de lâcheté.{/n} « La victoire appartient aux plus valeureux, à ceux dont la foi est la plus pure et dont les intentions sont les plus nobles. De telles qualités sont indispensables au commandement. Cette tradition a une part de vérité. »

languages.text: "Bu doğru. Savaş sadece bedenin gücünü değil, ruhun gücünü de sınar." {n}Argenta, yumruğunu gökyüzüne kaldırıyor ve korkaklık fikrini eziyormuş gibi kuvvetle sıkıyor.{/n} "Zafer en layık olana, inancı daha güçlü, niyeti daha saf olana aittir. Başkalarına liderlik etmesi gerekenler de böyleleri değil midir? Bu gelenekte doğruluk var."
languages.original_text: "That is true. Battle tests not only the strength of the body but also the power of the spirit." {n}Argenta raises her fist to the sky, clenching it with such force that she seems to crush the very idea of cowardice.{/n} "Triumph belongs to the most worthy, to the one whose faith is stronger and whose intent is purer. And is it not such that should lead others? There is truth in this tradition."

traits.locale_text: "Bu doğru. Savaş sadece bedenin gücünü değil, ruhun gücünü de sınar." {n}Argenta, yumruğunu gökyüzüne kaldırıyor ve korkaklık fikrini eziyormuş gibi kuvvetle sıkıyor.{/n} "Zafer en layık olana, inancı daha güçlü, niyeti daha saf olana aittir. Başkalarına liderlik etmesi gerekenler de böyleleri değil midir? Bu gelenekte doğruluk var."

languages.text: "Das ist wahr. Der Kampf prüft nicht nur die Stärke des Leibes, sondern auch die Kraft des Geistes." {n}Argenta reckt ihre Fäuste zum Himmel und ballt sie, als wolle sie die bloße Vorstellung von Feigheit zerquetschen.{/n} "Der Triumph gebührt den Würdigsten, deren Glaube stärker und deren Absicht reiner ist. Und sollten nicht genau sie den Rest anführen? Diese Tradition birgt eine große Wahrheit."
languages.original_text: "That is true. Battle tests not only the strength of the body but also the power of the spirit." {n}Argenta raises her fist to the sky, clenching it with such force that she seems to crush the very idea of cowardice.{/n} "Triumph belongs to the most worthy, to the one whose faith is stronger and whose intent is purer. And is it not such that should lead others? There is truth in this tradition."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist wahr. Der Kampf prüft nicht nur die Stärke des Leibes, sondern auch die Kraft des Geistes." {n}Argenta reckt ihre Fäuste zum Himmel und ballt sie, als wolle sie die bloße Vorstellung von Feigheit zerquetschen.{/n} "Der Triumph gebührt den Würdigsten, deren Glaube stärker und deren Absicht reiner ist. Und sollten nicht genau sie den Rest anführen? Diese Tradition birgt eine große Wahrheit."

languages.text: 「確かに、戦いは肉体の強さだけでなく、精神の強さをも試す。」{n}アルジェンタは拳を空に突き上げ、その力強さに怯えるような弱ささえも打ち砕くように握り締めた。{/n}「勝利は最もふさわしい者、信仰が強く、意図が純粋な者のものである。そして、そのような者こそ他者を導くべきである。この伝統には真実がある。」
languages.original_text: "That is true. Battle tests not only the strength of the body but also the power of the spirit." {n}Argenta raises her fist to the sky, clenching it with such force that she seems to crush the very idea of cowardice.{/n} "Triumph belongs to the most worthy, to the one whose faith is stronger and whose intent is purer. And is it not such that should lead others? There is truth in this tradition."
